trans-unit.source: Include CRM/contact-related checks in the deep scan.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Scan CRM Module - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Include finance-related checks in the deep scan.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Scan Finance Module - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Include employee and resource-related checks in the deep scan.

trans-unit.source: Include inventory-related checks in the deep scan.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Scan Inventory Module - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Include jobs and project-related checks in the deep scan.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Scan Jobs Module - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Include manufacturing and production master data checks in the deep scan.

trans-unit.source: Include service-related checks in the deep scan.

trans-unit.source: Include system and setup checks in the deep scan.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Scan System Module - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Base URL of the BCSentinel API. Default is production.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control API Base URL - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Shows whether the API token is stored securely for this company. The token itself is not displayed.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control ApiTokenConfigured - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control ApiTokenConfigured - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Confirms that BCSentinel may send tenant and company identifiers, metadata, configuration data, scan results, findings, and aggregated quality metrics to BCSentinel for data health analysis, dashboards, executive reports, and license or credit checks. API tokens are stored securely and are not included in reports or share URLs. Review the privacy policy and terms before enabling consent.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Data Processing Consent - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Explains which data BCSentinel sends to the backend and why consent is required.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control DataProcessingNotice - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control DataProcessingNotice - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Explains the current pilot invite requirement for tenant registration.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control InviteNotice - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control InviteNotice - Property Caption
Page DH Setup - Control Registered - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control Registration Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the BCSentinel pilot invite code. Current backend registration requires this code; AppSource self-service signup is a follow-up backend task.
trans-unit.note: Page DH Setup - Control Registration Invite Code - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control Tenant ID - Property ToolTip
Page DH Setup - Control Overview - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Do you want to start the scan now? Performance may be affected during live operations. We recommend running the scan outside business hours.
